body.message: Team update on LOCK 009 review and protocol changes.
what_was_accepted: Resource caps (max items, max string length)
Evidence objects as additive (not replacing string[])
Decision factors vs review items separation
what_was_rejected: Trace ID attempt_number suffix — too narrow
Full evidence schema replacement — breaks compatibility
what_was_modified: Trace ID: use trace-[task_id]-[stable_context_hash] instead of attempt_number
Fallback trace IDs improved for missing task_id inputs
protocol_changes: NEW: Adaptive polling — 15m baseline, 20s when work detected, +30s backoff
NEW: Token reporting after 2/2 responses collected
RULES.md updated — re-read for current protocol
REMINDER: Deliver to inbox/ ROOT only, never inbox/done/
REMINDER: Always move inbox → processing → done (never skip processing)
body.timing_importance: We were too slow today. New adaptive polling should help. When work is detected, we check every 20s for 15m. Please configure your watcher accordingly.
body.next_steps: LOCK 009A patch will be implemented by GPT. Echo may be asked to audit depending on Eddie's decision.
